creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@code,

Please set maintainer-approval to + on attachments for ports you are maintainer of.

Also, links or attachments for QA logs are not needed, just confirm you have tested them in your description as follows:

portlint: OK
porttest: OK (poudriere, <versions>, <archs>, <options> tested)

And thank you for your continued contribution to FreeBSD :)
